GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

FRENTE

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down. The cell in front at row 09 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To get toward the goal at row 08 column H, I need to turn and head right along the available safe path. From facing down, turning counter-clockwise will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The next cell to the right, row 08 column C, is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. To continue safely toward the goal at row 08 column H, I should turn clockwise to face down? But down is a wall. The only safe move that changes direction away from lava and toward the open corridor is to turn counter-clockwise to face up, then I can assess a safe route from there.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
